text.title: SSL/TLS Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply SSL/TLS Management end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: issue-cert
step.action: Cloudflare-origin: API call → save PEM + key. Let's Encrypt: certbot certonly --nginx.
step.output: Cert + key on disk + paths recorded.

step.name: wire-vhost
step.action: Update nginx vhost ssl_certificate + ssl_certificate_key + include ssl-params.conf.

step.name: install-monitor
step.action: Install check-cert-expiry.sh in daily cron with tg-send alert.
step.decision-gate: If alert path not configured, block — silent expirations are unacceptable.
